examples: Whether from jealousy or fear of someone who looked so different, my older brothers sometimes teased me about my unpleasing skin, or made fun of my clumsy walk.
There is much which will be unpleasing to the English reader.
Don't engage in a personal cover-up of areas that are unpleasing in your life.
The niacin pill will be paired with another drug to curtail niacin's main side effect of unpleasing flushing or an overheated feeling.
